name: Iceland (customs flag)

colors.symbolism: the Atlantic Ocean and the mountains

description: The Icelandic state flag (swallow-tailed Nordic-cross flag) defaced in the upper-hoist quadrant with a grey/silver letter 'T' — the symbol of the Icelandic customs (Tollur).
history: The Icelandic customs flag is the state ensign with a 'T' added to denote use by the customs authority.
